title: Gemma 3 Ramp-parity single-layer sweep
goal: Reproduce Ramp-style single-layer findings on Gemma 3 27B-IT using deterministic layer and multiplier sweeps across layers 16-53.
constraints: Target Gemma 3 27B-IT only for this task.
Sweep candidate layers 16-53 with deterministic seeds and persisted run-card metadata.
Include sparse global and dense control configurations so degeneration cliffs are measurable.
definition_of_done: Sweep artifact ranks single-layer candidates and records hard-gate pass/fail metrics.
Result includes coherence, adherence, degeneration, and language stability metrics per configuration.
Top candidate set includes at least one result near Ramp-reported layer behavior for follow-on calibration.
rollback_note: If parity sweep outputs are unstable, freeze the previous deterministic harness and rerun with pinned prompts and judge settings before changing defaults.
